hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, provider outputs, and compliance rules to automate case management, routing, and audit evidence within your existing workflow stack.

problem_title: Travel Rule workflows depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams at VASPs face delays and operational gaps when Travel Rule message routing and exception handling happen across disconnected systems. This fragmentation makes it difficult to maintain a clear audit trail and coordinate review efforts efficiently.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates Travel Rule message routing, exception handling, case creation and audit evidence into a unified workflow that reduces manual handoffs and improves operational transparency for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule message to case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule message status and exceptions into structured cases for manual review, evidence preservation and compliance reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule. The workflow layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule provider outputs into cases, decisions, exception workflows and audit evidence without replacing existing compliance systems or providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled Travel Rule workflows, audit-ready evidence preservation and operational readiness for bank due diligence in regulated enterprise environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports Travel Rule workflows by connecting message routing, status tracking, exception handling, case management and audit evidence into one compliance layer above providers.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes exception events to cases for review, enabling compliance teams to manage failed or incomplete Travel Rule messages within structured workflows and maintain audit-ready records.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages to support audit readiness and traceable review of Travel Rule events and compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers by connecting their outputs, normalizing data and enabling coordinated routing, review and reporting within a connected compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, enhancing visibility, traceability and compliance without disrupting existing provider relationships.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule workflows into one layer
final_description: Review how SFTY connects message routing, exceptions, cases and audit evidence above Travel Rule providers.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
